string 2:
Grrr! I guess you're all we have right now! Get after that
dark interloper! Hurry!

If it can take out even Nervy... then what in the world is
that thing?!

We can't let anything happen to that egg down there! Even
the human world would be in peril!
Look! You just have to trust me! Please, protect the egg!
You have to stop that dark shadow thing! Please!
